blended.narrative: Windham Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 693 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
